name: AI Judgment Job
description: Runs the standard judgment sequence (judge → ace_consensus → alignment_mirror) using the reasoning backend. Replaces scripts/run_judgment_job.ts. Override context vars mission_id, job_id, and subject as needed.

params.instruction: Evaluate the quality, correctness, and alignment of the subject matter against the mission criteria and Kyberion governance standards. Provide a structured judgment with scores and rationale.
Review the primary judgment and produce an ACE (Aggregated Consensus Evaluation) by identifying points of agreement, contention, and the final consensus position.
Reflect on both the primary judgment and the ACE consensus. Identify any misalignments with the sovereign's values and long-term vision, and suggest corrective directions.

params.message: ✅ [JUDGMENT] Judgment job complete. Results written to active/shared/tmp/judgment-results-{{job_id}}.json
